title: Vineyard and Chestnuts Feast | Mas du Chanoine
description: Vineyard and Chestnuts Feast: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: This feast organized by the winemakers from St. Paul and Tourrettes-sur-Loup is a gourmand appointment of autumn. On the bowling square, wine tasting stands mix with a local produce market. Hot wine and roasted chestnuts are offered all day, and tables are set for on-site dining in a friendly atmosphere.
